rulings.Case Title: WAUKEEN Q. MCCOY VS. CRAIG LIPTON ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, June 2, 2017, line 1. DEFENDANT CRAIG LIPTON's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED without leave to amend. Plaintiff has no standing and bankruptcy trustee has settled the case with the approval of the Court. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ADA SORTO ET AL VS. WEDGEWOOD, INC. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, June 2, 2017, line 2. DEFENDANT SHELDON T. FONG, AN INDIVIDUAL, SHELDON T. FONG AS TRUSTEE OF SHELDON T. FONG's DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. There is no same cause of action pending between the parties to the cross-complaint. (CCP 460.10(c)) and the cross-complaint, "under the particular facts alleged" does not operate inequitably. See Paragon Real Estate Group v. Hansen (2009) 178 Cal.App.4th 177 and Laurendale Associates v. Wilson (1992) 7 Cal.App.4th 1439. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ADA SORTO ET AL VS. WEDGEWOOD, INC. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, June 2, 2017, line 2. DEFENDANT UNITED THREE GROUPS, INC.'s DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. There is no same cause of action pending between the parties to the cross-complaint. (CCP 460.10(c)) and the cross-complaint, "under the particular facts alleged" does not operate inequitably. See Paragon Real Estate Group v. Hansen (2009) 178 Cal.App.4th 177 and Laurendale Associates v. Wilson (1992) 7 Cal.App.4th 1439. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SALLY LIU VS. WENDY HENRIQUEZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, June 2, 2017, line 6. DEFENDANTs WENDY HENRIQUEZ and DERIK AQUINO's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint is sufficiently alleged and is not uncertain; the Court has jurisdiction. Request for Judicial Notice of the truth of the matters asserted in the print-outs is denied. = (501/REQ)
